rulings.Case Title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. JOSEPH WATKINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 3, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WATKINS's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges that the tenancy is created pursuant to a written rental agreement.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. JOSEPH WATKINS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Deft'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories; Etc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 3, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT JOSEPH WATKINS's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Deft'S Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories Hearing Required. The Court finds that there was no good faith meet and confer effort on Defendant's part prior to filing on this motion. Defendant failed to respond to March 14, 2017 letter, thereby failing to narrow the issues on this motion in light of the arguments and concessions made in March 14, 2017 letter. The parties shall appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in a meaningful meet and confer efforts. The Court is considering imposition of sanctions.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN HOM VS. PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 3, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC's Motion To Strike First Amended Complaint For Unlawful Detainer Continued to April 13, 2017. Opposing party to comply with rule 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than April 4, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Plaintiff and his counsel are ordered to comply with SFRO 2.7B in future. Failure to do so may result in the motion being treated as unopposed.= (501/REQ)
